name: dev-workflow
description: PRD-first development workflow with testing built in: write PRDs and phased implementation plans (each phase ships its own tests), run multi-stage plan reviews (junior Q&A, senior architecture review with framework-idiom, behavior-deletion, and test-coverage checks), spin up a docs-first research sub-agent to answer technical questions and find best practices, implement plans phase-by-phase with progress tracking, write and run Playwright end-to-end tests via a bundled MCP, run 7-reviewer parallel code reviews including regression and test-execution passes, collect tradeoff decisions, and audit docs against the codebase.
